query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_students,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fullName) as unique_names,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(fullName, '-', grade, '-', section)) as unique_records
FROM students;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35xPkBa73Yuiy4A.root --database kcQuJzmxhkjxjyE5pHTEwG --execute SELECT

  COUNT(DISTINCT fullName) as unique_names,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(fullName, '-', grade, '-', section)) as unique_records
FROM students;
